From California to Texas to Nebraska to New York, we urgently need your help.

**PRESIDENT TRUMP IS BACK! **

**President Donald J. Trump is speaking in North Carolina TOMORROW!** Before he goes live, he's counting on our grassroots network to have his back.
_
Big Tech has censored him.

The Fake News Media has canceled him.

AND the Left is working day and night to ERASE his legacy._

With the odds stacked against us, President Trump and House Conservatives need YOU to step up BEFORE he takes the stage. Trump spent 4 years putting America First - Make sure that his effort isn't for nothing!

body:
(Spoiler: No.) If you hadn't seen, the Wisconsin Democrats are [holding their state convention this weekend](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mulikyk-ahkdjtlkr-r/). _(And you probably HAVEN'T seen, because they're holding it all over Zoom... still.)_They're calling their theme: the "Badger Bounce Back."**But their actual POLICIES would send Wisconsin crashing to the ground! ** [[ JOIN CONGRESSMAN FITZGERALD ] - Say NO to the WI Democrats](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mulikyk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) They're calling it the "[Badger Bounce Back,](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mulikyk-ahkdjtlkr-j/)" but their ACTIONS tell a different story.
* They're STILL hosting it on Zoom, rather than supporting Wisconsin businesses with a convention.
* They STILL support supplemental $300 checks to pay people not to work.
* They STILL want to keep our schools closed.
* They STILL support job-killing tax hikes and regulations, rather than supporting hard-hit businesses.

**Here's what would REALLY help Wisconsin "bounce back" - FEWER DEMOCRATS IN CHARGE.**[**Please, take a moment to OPPOSE the Democrats' Convention this weekend, and help Congressman Fitzgerald TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY in Congress!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mulikyk-ahkdjtlkr-t/) -Team Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mulikyk-ahkdjtlkr-i/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mulikyk-ahkdjtlkr-k/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Six months of major recovery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. The House majority is hanging on by a thread. With redistricting, Republicans could be at an automatic advantage ahead of the midterms in 2022. To top it off, the national GOP launched digital ads attacking me this week. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30307144/289136876/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdiMDQ4My0wYWM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6VPuarsrkUW_BXCu9wk756ItWYq86xhratlh84pk-w=&emci=09a95fb2-04c6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=587b0483-0ac6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15529135) | I know my team has been emailing you a lot this week about our extended fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. The House majority is hanging on by a thread. With redistricting, Republicans could be at an automatic advantage ahead of the midterms in 2022. To top it off, the national GOP launched digital ads attacking me this week. The GOP only needs to defeat a few Democrats to take back the House majority – _**and I am on their target list.**_ Guided by the basic tenets of responsibility and decency, the Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan, the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the For the People Act, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, AND the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act. All in the first six months of 2021! _Under Republican leadership, none of these bills would have seen the light of day._ **We have made major headway in just a few short months – I do not want to see our country move backward by ceding the House in 2022. ** [**Can you chip in $5, $15, or whatever you can today to help maintain the House majority in 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30307147/289136878/1522229062?refcode=E8956-20210605-JuneKickoff4-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NationalRepublicanOrg-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdiMDQ4My0wYWM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6VPuarsrkUW_BXCu9wk756ItWYq86xhratlh84pk-w=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30307149/289136880/1522229062?express_lane=true&refcode=E8956-20210605-JuneKickoff4-EG-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NationalRepublicanOrg-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdiMDQ4My0wYWM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6VPuarsrkUW_BXCu9wk756ItWYq86xhratlh84pk-w=)

It's important we show strong numbers | | |

Hey there, At the end of June, our fundraising totals will be made public. New Hampshire was the closest Senate race in the country in 2016, so the GOP will scour our reports for signs of weakness and use it to lob attacks at Senator Hassan and try to flip the Granite State -- and the Senate -- back to Republican control. That’s why this month, we’re setting weekly (and sometimes daily!) fundraising goals to keep ourselves on track. Today, we need just 3 donations from 03264 -- and Senator Hassan asked if you could be one of them. **[Please: Pitch in $5 or as much as you can to protect New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat and stop Republicans from buying back Democrats’ fragile majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30307231/289137105/1251890980?refcode=e20210604_zip&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGU1YzJiYS0wYWM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqteMIgsFCPp2tm6Orq4gvbaFk1gISzMREMJ__egMtE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30307232/289137106/1251890980?refcode=e20210604_zip&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGU1YzJiYS0wYWM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqteMIgsFCPp2tm6Orq4gvbaFk1gISzMREMJ__egMtE=)

Mitch McConnell has been personally recruiting his favorite candidate to challenge Maggie, and FOX News’ Sean Hannity has thrown his support behind one of the state’s most far-right conservatives.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_KU7fotVhoZIczP5Li6vEPfq3SuO7lLsucjUfxeJYHQ=/y36SfY2fi54c6-WHwPTJTA1e-eZwFm7NkxYuz1yQnmQ=?refcode=060521)
| | Friend, Happy Pride Month, Minnesota! I hope this month is a joyous time of celebration and self-expression. There is a long way to go -- until transgender women of color stop experiencing violence at devastatingly high rates, LGBTQ+ youth aren't forced to change who they are, and every member of our community is treated equally -- but I will be working alongside you every step of the way. Today, and every day, we stand with our LGBTQ+ friends, neighbors, and colleagues as we improve equity for all Minnesotans. From legalizing marriage equality to leading the charge against conversion therapy, the House DFL will always be dedicated allies to the LBGTQ+ community. Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives P.S. The Political Contribution Refund Program has been renewed for 2021.**[_If you are a Minnesota resident, make your refundable donation of $50 (or $100 per couple) today._](https://act.myngp.com/el/_KU7fotVhoZIczP5Li6vEPfq3SuO7lLsucjUfxeJYHQ=/y36SfY2fi54c6-WHwPTJTA1e-eZwFm7NkxYuz1yQnmQ=?refcode=060521)** [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_KU7fotVhoZIczP5Li6vEPfq3SuO7lLsucjUfxeJYHQ=/y36SfY2fi54c6-WHwPTJTA1e-eZwFm7NkxYuz1yQnmQ=?refcode=060521)

clean_body: | | Friend, Happy Pride Month, Minnesota! I hope this month is a joyous time of celebration and self-expression. There is a long way to go -- until transgender women of color stop experiencing violence at devastatingly high rates, LGBTQ+ youth aren't forced to change who they are, and every member of our community is treated equally -- but I will be working alongside you every step of the way. Today, and every day, we stand with our LGBTQ+ friends, neighbors, and colleagues as we improve equity for all Minnesotans. From legalizing marriage equality to leading the charge against conversion therapy, the House DFL will always be dedicated allies to the LBGTQ+ community. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives P.S. The Political Contribution Refund Program has been renewed for 2021. | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: READ: Stonewall and LGBTQ+ history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
As the first openly gay, Black member of Congress in American history, this fight for LGBTQ+ liberation is personal to me.
#

This Thursday, Mondaire visited the Stonewall Inn to commemorate Pride Month. As an LGBTQ+ historymaker himself, it was a powerful occasion for him. Please read on for a history lesson about the events at Stonewall and Mondaire's reflection on the fight for LGBTQ+ liberation.
**[After you read, please chip in whatever you can to help re-elect Mondaire. We need to keep him in Congress fighting for LGBTQ+ equity.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30308938/289145298/-254107743?refcode2=2fb65eff-0fc6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210605-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI2NWVmZi0wZmM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvpT3mFkE067lJJlDwa-e44mm5zW7Rx-2Ffq2jiu_Jc=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30308940/289145320/-254107743?refcode2=2fb65eff-0fc6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210605-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmI2NWVmZi0wZmM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvpT3mFkE067lJJlDwa-e44mm5zW7Rx-2Ffq2jiu_Jc=)**
I spent Thursday morning with Interior Secretary Deb Haaland at the Stonewall Inn, the New York City gay bar that became the birthplace of the modern LGBTQ+ rights movement and the first-ever national monument honoring LGBTQ+ history in America.
It was particularly moving for me to visit now that I am a member of Congress — something that, until recent years, I never believed possible for me as an openly gay, Black person in America.
In 1960s New York City, it was common for LGBTQ+ folks to be harassed and humiliated in the streets. Moreover, thanks to outdated laws, anyone found to be dressing in a way that wasn’t in alignment with gender norms was subject to arrest — often losing their livelihoods as a result.
Gay bars like the Stonewall Inn were rare safe spaces for queer people in a world where openly living your truth as a queer person was impossible — but they were also subject to violent police raids.
In the early hours of June 28, 1969, police once again raided the Stonewall Inn – but this time, patrons fought back. After living through constant harassment and police violence, the heroic patrons of Stonewall – many of whom were trans and gender-nonconforming people of color – said enough was enough.
The events at Stonewall were revolutionary for LGBTQ+ people. America’s first gay pride parade was held on the one-year anniversary of the Stonewall Riots. In the years since then, the LGBTQ+ community has gained more rights and more mainstream acceptance than many ever dreamed possible.
But this fight for LGBTQ+ liberation is far from over. We can't mark Pride without addressing the crisis of violence against trans people in America. According to the Human Rights Council, 2020 was the deadliest year on record for violent murders of transgender or gender non-conforming people, most of whom were Black or Hispanic.
LGBTQ+ people also disproportionately bear the burden of student debt, in part because many families still shun LGBTQ+ children and cut off financial and emotional support they would otherwise extend to a straight, cisgender family member.
Queer people are more likely to lack health insurance – and even with health insurance, trans and gender non-conforming folks are often discriminated against when trying to seek medical care.
It is still legal under federal law to be discriminated against on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity – and until the filibuster is abolished so the Senate can pass the Equality Act, that will not change.
As the first openly gay, Black member of Congress in history, this fight for LGBTQ+ liberation is personal to me. It impacts every issue we hold dear as progressives. Visiting Stonewall Thursday, I was reminded how much progress has been made, but also how much further we have to go to achieve a world where all LGBTQ+ people can live their truth without fearing for their safety and security.
This Pride Month, let’s celebrate the experiences of those who came before us as we build on their work in our ongoing fight for equality and equity. Together, this movement will continue to make history and further LGBTQ+ liberation – but only if we fight for it together.
Onward,
Mondaire

Queer people are more likely to lack health insurance – and even with health insurance, trans and gender non-conforming folks are often discriminated against when trying to seek medical care. It is still legal under federal law to be discriminated against on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity – and until the filibuster is abolished so the Senate can pass the Equality Act, that will not change. As the first openly gay, Black member of Congress in history, this fight for LGBTQ+ liberation is personal to me. It impacts every issue we hold dear as progressives. Visiting Stonewall Thursday, I was reminded how much progress has been made, but also how much further we have to go to achieve a world where all LGBTQ+ people can live their truth without fearing for their safety and security. This Pride Month, let’s celebrate the experiences of those who came before us as we build on their work in our ongoing fight for equality and equity. Together, this movement will continue to make history and further LGBTQ+ liberation – but only if we fight for it together. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

Dear Friend,

I am joining two national television programs soon to discuss the American Jobs Plan--the transformative transportation and infrastructure legislation that will rebuild our crumbling infrastructure with American materials and workers.

As a senior member of the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I have been working with the White House and other key officials to enact the American Jobs Plan into law, which will create thousands of new middle-class jobs and provide a historic investment into the future of America.

Today, I'll be discussing the legislation of Fox News at 9 am PT/12 pm ET, and on Monday I will discuss it on CNN at 7 am PT/10 am ET. I hope you will join me for these important discussions.

I am grateful for your support over the years. I will continue the fight in Washington for an infrastructure bill that provides the much-needed support that every American community deserves.

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Trump’s arrival sends a clear message: The GOP desperately wants to keep North Carolina’s Senate seat.
#
**As you read this, Donald Trump is in Greenville, NC.**
He’s drumming up support for North Carolina Republicans, including our Trump-loving opponent for U.S. Senate, Ted Budd, and white supremacist insurrectionist Madison Cawthorne.
Later on, he’ll deliver a speech at the NC GOP convention that is completely closed to journalists and the free press.
**Trump’s arrival sends a clear message: The GOP desperately wants to keep North Carolina’s Senate seat.** They will do anything to ensure that the next Senator is another white, conservative man — and not a progressive Black woman like Erica Smith.
[**_Will you please send a donation from your state to help protect our campaign from Donald Trump and future GOP attacks? This is Trump’s first major speech in months, making support for our scrappy North Carolina campaign all the more urgent._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2312?refcode=em20210605-141&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=141%2E3698%2ENE2y_U)

name: Team Crist
subject: the Koch network has entered the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Republicans are already spending big to protect DeSantis because they know we can beat him.
|
---

| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VCk5HX5A3DmbHvjFIOi3lw==/tZpAHMkUECHd_dg-vVURvQ==?refcode=20210605_f_1_fl&amount=25)
---
Friend,

The race for Florida governor just got more interesting:

A new ad campaign backed by none other than **the Koch network is praising Ron DeSantis** for his record as governor! We don't know about you, but in our eyes a bungled COVID response and a pattern of prioritizing the interests of wealthy communities over everyday Floridians is nothing to be proud of.

To make matters worse, a new, right-wing platform called _El American_ has begun publishing pro-DeSantis content targeting Latino voters in Florida. They're backed by a shady group of investors and use language that makes even _FOX News_ look moderate in comparison.

These are just two of many examples of right-wing media outlets promoting disinformation in an effort to sway opinions and influence elections. **We are going to need all the help we can get to keep our messaging out there and combat these deceitful actions by right-wing media outlets.**
[PITCH IN TO HELP US CORRECT THE RECORD
AND DEFEAT DESANTIS](https://act.myngp.com/el/VCk5HX5A3DmbHvjFIOi3lw==/tZpAHMkUECHd_dg-vVURvQ==?refcode=20210605_f_1_fl&amount=25)
---
Here's the deal: Republicans are already spending big to protect DeSantis because **they know we can beat him**. And while groups like the Koch network and _El American_ may have nearly unlimited amounts of money at their disposal, we have something even better: Grassroots support from people like _you_.

We can beat DeSantis, but **we need you in our corner** to make it happen. A grassroots organization needs resources to pay for everything from clipboards, pens, and paper -- to ads on TV, radio, and the internet. And every single donation, no matter how small, adds up to make a big difference.

**So friend, if you 're able, please pitch in today to help us fight back against DeSantis and his big money allies so we can finally build a Florida for all Floridians:**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

To make matters worse, a new, right-wing platform called El American has begun publishing pro-DeSantis content targeting Latino voters in Florida. They're backed by a shady group of investors and use language that makes even FOX News look moderate in comparison. These are just two of many examples of right-wing media outlets promoting disinformation in an effort to sway opinions and influence elections. We are going to need all the help we can get to keep our messaging out there and combat these deceitful actions by right-wing media outlets. Here's the deal: Republicans are already spending big to protect DeSantis because they know we can beat him. And while groups like the Koch network and El American may have nearly unlimited amounts of money at their disposal, we have something even better: Grassroots support from people like you. We can beat DeSantis, but we need you in our corner to make it happen. During my time in the Virginia House of Delegates, we’ve expanded Medicaid to over 500,000 people, abolished the death penalty, legalized marijuana, and ratified the Equal Rights Amendment. Finally.
**But we still have so far to go.** As a single mother, I’ve struggled like so many folks with finding adequate health insurance, housing, and a good job that pays the bills. The public health and economic crises of the past year show just how many people are struggling, and how much work we have left to do.

This week's updates from Joe Kent (Candidate for WA-03) | | | |
---
| | |

|
####
# **Joe Kent
Highlights 30 May-5 June 2021**
---
|
**Upcoming Events & Media:

Tuesday, 8 June: **Wahkiakum County GOP Meeting at 6pm-8pm. Located at 1377 WA-4, Skamokawa, WA 98647
**Sunday, 13 June** : Revival Baptist Church, 10am-12pm. Located at 411 SE Chkalov Drive, Vancouver, WA 98683
**Wednesday, 16 June:** Wahkiakum County Town Hall, 6pm-7pm. Located at Erickson Park, 581 Columbia St, Cathlamet, WA 98612
**Saturday, 19 June:** Glenwood Rodeo, located at Trout Lake Highway, Glenwood, WA 98619
**Saturday, 26 June:** Fundraiser, Click link for details and tickets **[26 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=b671481e11&e=00856e661d)
Sunday, 27 June, Fundraiser, **Click link for details and tickets** [27 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=c1ef95df79&e=00856e661d)

This Week's Events/Clips:**

**Monday, 31 May -**[Heather Kaiser is Guest Speaker at Veterans Memorial Museum in Chehalis (video)](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=d39b7c7517&e=00856e661d)

**Volunteer Updates:**

**Want to Volunteer? Sign up[here](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=47ca5f6a07&e=00856e661d)!

Media

Monday, 31 May - **[Steve Bannon War Room Pandemic , Episode 988, The Honored Dead, Memorial Day Special ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=0d4b6f624d&e=00856e661d) ,
**Monday, 31 May -**[Joe joins Tim Pool on Timcast IRL, Episode #298](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=3f0ce64778&e=00856e661d)
**Friday, 4 June** \- [Joe joins Sophie Mann on Real America's Voice](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=af016c90e2&e=00856e661d)
**Friday, 4 June -**[Lars Larson - Joe Kent responds to JHB interview](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=efe7bfe58d&e=00856e661d)

**PRESS RELEASES:**

**Press Release - 3 June, Joe Kent Challenges Jaime Herrera Beutler to Debate: ** [Click here to view a PDF of Joe Kent's Press Release](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=00646e9238&e=00856e661d)

name: Gen. Boykin
subject: Every Bible-believing American will suffer under this legislation
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b63a02a01fc541cabc2f471f1507f29a&_e=f_znJ1pdgDxzOptYdiFKvZDbsijODh_n5FXqFhHUc7ZSJmr1iIjQMkISoCmLAE6boFyt4SBuMbXOyO0Mwq0jitzK-LeRzAMiTbILebxourzwUz5Zfl0cQSaXGC1b4k4cu6i74X3ZxD0-6wybErJxUWNyuhGDEn3W1yYOdIjeRP_sktXy7LfR1_NNrkl_oJZAPIYPJGAoaHJaQWG02jFxe3PdkDj7UfkMYCoJWtLFz0qLxGfFBTZefALs-XDYzB50KPtLjs8Kf3Pszk2RpOGYEQtRlU0GWbzP3RTu4nGZMQXgQOfcv4K8YgfE3W_fKARm) | |
---
Dear fellow American,

As our nation deals with the ripple effects of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is critical that Christian and conservative Americans hold the line on our values as leftists try to exploit the crisis to push their anti-biblical policies.

Imagine an America where religious hospitals are forced to perform abortions. Where Bible-believing churches could be forced to hire pastors and other employees who don’t follow the teachings of the church and could be required to host same-sex wedding ceremonies. Where Christian schools are forced to cater to the preferences of students who identify as transgender, threatening the privacy and safety of young girls.

If the Senate passes the “Equality” Act — which has already passed the House of Representatives — _**this is the future that could lie before us**._

This disastrous legislation is an all-out assault on parental rights, on the family, and on millions of people of faith in our nation. It quarantines faith within your mind and says that’s where it must stay!

**Almost no institution or person of faith—be it a school, church, business, or non-profit—will escape the reach of this catastrophic bill if it passes the Senate and is sent to President Biden’s desk, where it’s sure to be signed into law. **

**[Can I count on your gift of $10, $25, $50, or more to help Family Research Council Action defeat the “Equality” Act today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b63a02a01fc541cabc2f471f1507f29a&_e=f_znJ1pdgDxzOptYdiFKvZDbsijODh_n5FXqFhHUc7ZSJmr1iIjQMkISoCmLAE6boFyt4SBuMbXOyO0Mwq0jitzK-LeRzAMiTbILebxourwUdZMgiT3F6hDjdRmdRo372P-4gl5QE43T9ofgiGePDuC0wphmG5pt4P1-Eey5n35hszz0go-QDVRigMxHidywrGx9Br_p3rnamAmd2gxNj1pJ-kfVqFzbS3hPPKKSC1kQ7d6JiOL_Ahyozilz2xspZS7EDEsnf4Hu2O_AEAJ-kWqdZv--6AEFlSCYW6-AZho9z1rM00kFR7yS6rNERIjw)**
[**Help Stop the "Equality" Act**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b63a02a01fc541cabc2f471f1507f29a&_e=f_znJ1pdgDxzOptYdiFKvZDbsijODh_n5FXqFhHUc7ZSJmr1iIjQMkISoCmLAE6boFyt4SBuMbXOyO0Mwq0jitzK-LeRzAMiTbILebxourw-yUMNP7I0kt1vtZFX_Dh9P_wxwlYoskn_ZoLKszaBhG0SMFeaYdx7k1UfbcqcyszY803Yz4jseW9iAvRwUhVyGvq-zq_VX8bryAJ8GHs_JUI_gu47mP5RsivrxRy7Ja9EaRwGPsu1w0mhtNQvWUjaiD7fu74olnws0CtEq9F1VXHqeFM9MNDURfFCQhX2kBXS0FZNZP0xOQrBLpRYBf67)
While touted as “equality,” this legislation would be more appropriately named the “Inequality Act.”

It aims to expand numerous civil rights laws, including the Civil Rights Act of 1964, to create protected classes based on sexual orientation and gender identity, thereby positioning the government to lord over churches and other faith-based institutions, potentially dictating who they hire, how their facilities are used, and even punishing some of them for not falling in step with a view of human sexuality that directly contradicts orthodox biblical teaching.

It would force all those in the medical community—regardless of their moral, religious, or medical opinions—to offer hormone treatment and transgender surgeries for individuals suffering from gender dysphoria.

**If passed and signed into law, it would cause a significant loss of religious freedom in America, and every Bible-believing citizen will suffer the consequences. **

**This bill is an egregious attack on the freedom to believe, and it must be stopped!**

Many of the nation's top evangelical pastors and religious leaders have already signed a letter warning against this bill, and now I need your signature to help stop this disastrous legislation.

**[I hope I can count on you to join us with your gift to STOP the “Equality” Act.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b63a02a01fc541cabc2f471f1507f29a&_e=f_znJ1pdgDxzOptYdiFKvZDbsijODh_n5FXqFhHUc7ZSJmr1iIjQMkISoCmLAE6boFyt4SBuMbXOyO0Mwq0jitzK-LeRzAMiTbILebxouryu2a6HR4fyFmiuOaHlNatdA_OgAtBIrrKwdm1uq6ZkWlJX1S1h0wPJ03kUSH1T1bFTmGQlr_VJhjz3wGAu6pdASqKbDmtu7gVH8a3tinUAjWsu_ED8JLPSbrwHAvV5Pqd5Ak2HXaRler7OkdlkAM-HkAP0l1ezI3-7IBquE_62c3mcvkeNCHkamqQhYyimGPKbg5uFljQqBdcmE8vIG9PR)**

As the legislative affiliate of Family Research Council, FRC Action seeks to educate and influence elected officials on Capitol Hill and in the states, activate our grassroots network, and mobilize voters on behalf of faith, family, and freedom.

**FRC Action exists so that our nation’s most fundamental values are represented as we impact public policy, influence elections, and support candidates who share our values. **

Even during these difficult times, you and I must continue our vital work to defeat the “Equality” Act, which poses the gravest threat in decades to the American family and religious liberty.

But to continue leading the charge to stop this disastrous bill, we need your support.

**[Please help us urge the Senate to reject this legislation and defend religious freedom in America with your gift of $10, $25, or any amount today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b63a02a01fc541cabc2f471f1507f29a&_e=f_znJ1pdgDxzOptYdiFKvZDbsijODh_n5FXqFhHUc7ZSJmr1iIjQMkISoCmLAE6boFyt4SBuMbXOyO0Mwq0jitzK-LeRzAMiTbILebxouryKnmemSsF0SdO_P6qgeuydWiEHFWqgkRHtS7uiaIkTu5AnbysMxUBARHPJdGsK7ewtRDnNqnJWps1B6T-OCmfX3YPGy4dDiY0xCi5SUw-gembHdiZVn0vyvmlENhHvORIQR6el0E81xPYMpkNE6CAFbjaAm0Fq1hjn8WtUOWj77bdgfXgKneW10ZjOtHQII4qsm78PHmtkCtu2tK9oSS4x)**
[**Help Stop the "Equality" Act**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b63a02a01fc541cabc2f471f1507f29a&_e=f_znJ1pdgDxzOptYdiFKvZDbsijODh_n5FXqFhHUc7ZSJmr1iIjQMkISoCmLAE6boFyt4SBuMbXOyO0Mwq0jitzK-LeRzAMiTbILebxouryAyOCjkCGM_XWtzRml1cQ5-61X7-8Tbiqt4Q3xxRHhGLX9DSjO96OiR9DpydIq0cgaQxbVhQhKhPuccGBSgpxY9_tcIT-K5HF_eHAkSy9Iyez8y4bK9gr6xsgnZe3YXso75sLElAKLa0Re38WelqJRgDmmdP99ThRnhBiQtCcHpgLGMCRSiY0dZOnEVTpRrPwHYIZfCxIkxCi-8G7WnmXX)
With your help, we will defeat the “Equality” Act.

Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

[1-877/372-2808](tel:1-800-225-4008) | [Contact FRC Action](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b63a02a01fc541cabc2f471f1507f29a&_e=4nAnN--0YcSP_8wfjmdSmZAQhhhut-SqZERnLo4LqWpebLcLPX__XyM668YMRLzZSuBFslADqgkL3vqiVtDazgo6VJ0EgNGPi4A2ccTlN98rPnckJhGayrjYHMXY5WaiyssTZtnNqm5vdVKh_WPbjpvVVfayimTZ5caUMClTIpv5nObV-5roxImGdwXH6VLCnb-SykI-IBCp96UOecwr6_PlA1b0XsN6V6r73Dr15Uirb9BxlpORORvuNurGInvt9BtUQHzs1I4I1kAkj42mKSZNjZk9LHasas3U_gEAhd3llxzvV-SygMyqdqF1t6qov5PgdWYUmFC0enD41AIRqBvdHP9fts9atJ6cN2bhDZHVuBDDvYsnZTxMCg8vSXFVbUlr-sSJ2Tc90xahgQGwcerRYFrP94nKoOlPcSPRLLnoQ0g9PMEJHY4yB1B4c1zaaP3zOGCq2f7PLVMCoJItCDbvhhUHdqJl7B094bJkTW4CWpyTJsgGWIzT-x2CEsf1mhZE9X0OwNiBe_oGq28jzhTfYxMMmEPURzhe3FmPpcnET42WlGO9-NPt2Rnex_nCHsQYRbYtV9qSDcQds6Qb3xoIOGXrZNEZjSU4DC7_ByNR4gMs8BsvFUvvq0HnZmUA)

_**NOW,** we’re learning it’s very likely that COVID-19 _LEAKED_ from a lab in Wuhan, China. _

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Who wrote this speech??
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I debunked Kamala Harris' terrible commencement speech at the Naval Academy and continued to fight back against the left's woke assault on our military. I also continued to call out the left's lies over common sense voting integrity measures in Texas.
Now, here's your brief.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| CALLING OUT KAMALA HARRIS' WOKE COMMENCEMENT SPEECH
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xcZVyOyzKvXXHiMfFsf8jZAymAlBsm6WUySYDU9DLq5MjmG7v-17SYQLNGViBETARhMHJBW_fAshuN41WFDoKPHxbeK7deS-BX4QlLwLLCiJyug36d8YookFIXhBO11-yW2xCTNBnnfPb16YuaR1PpuTu23T7MGSWtgslkcjVHXUyj0JJ-hX4Y6C_wSdcRkYLn-nPFKIhPh0_IAp0D2BzSjwyrkTYrOgKouFc5h672qZiQgoPfUzuX0MkC7vIsqQrJlyJ8wrhODqYei-3Rn0IgSGMX1leoj-&c=A3F7a0n_qUMLMKlU89lPAwdrHbCRzw1LYmgmtypKqgj_nps3490lZQ==&ch=HKU2hn9epzcfW6bIojp5l3K0J0jkJ7anJy1ziJyVTjrYdAnsd2bzIA==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xcZVyOyzKvXXHiMfFsf8jZAymAlBsm6WUySYDU9DLq5MjmG7v-17SYQLNGViBETARhMHJBW_fAshuN41WFDoKPHxbeK7deS-BX4QlLwLLCiJyug36d8YookFIXhBO11-yW2xCTNBnnfPb16YuaR1PpuTu23T7MGSWtgslkcjVHXUyj0JJ-hX4Y6C_wSdcRkYLn-nPFKIhPh0_IAp0D2BzSjwyrkTYrOgKouFc5h672qZiQgoPfUzuX0MkC7vIsqQrJlyJ8wrhODqYei-3Rn0IgSGMX1leoj-&c=A3F7a0n_qUMLMKlU89lPAwdrHbCRzw1LYmgmtypKqgj_nps3490lZQ==&ch=HKU2hn9epzcfW6bIojp5l3K0J0jkJ7anJy1ziJyVTjrYdAnsd2bzIA==)
---
| The left really can't help themselves.
They try to inject their woke ideology into EVERY aspect of our lives, including our military. The best example this week was Kamala Harris' ridiculous speech to graduates of the Naval Academy.
Kamala Harris didn't talk about leadership or bravery or fighting for America. No, can you guess what she talked about instead? SOLAR PANELS.
That's right. Kamala Harris' "moving" speech to Naval Academy graduates - young people who will fight to defend our freedoms - was focused on how the military is going to use "green energy" as combat power.
Are you kidding me??
First of all, the Navy is powered by nuclear energy, which is a zero-carbon emitting, reliable power source unlike solar or wind. Second, the military is NEVER going to adopt a Green New Deal approach to warfighting because we actually need DEPENDABLE power sources when we are on a mission.
But the left doesn't care about science. And they definitely don't care about keeping our military strong. All they care about is woke nonsense and implementing their leftist ideology any way they can.
[Help me fight back.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xcZVyOyzKvXXHiMfFsf8jZAymAlBsm6WUySYDU9DLq5MjmG7v-17SYQLNGViBETARhMHJBW_fAshuN41WFDoKPHxbeK7deS-BX4QlLwLLCiJyug36d8YookFIXhBO11-yW2xCTNBnnfPb16YuaR1PpuTu23T7MGSWtgslkcjVHXUyj0JJ-hX4Y6C_wSdcRkYLn-nPFKIhPh0_IAp0D2BzSjwyrkTYrOgKouFc5h672qZiQgoPfUzuX0MkC7vIsqQrJlyJ8wrhODqYei-3Rn0IgSGMX1leoj-&c=A3F7a0n_qUMLMKlU89lPAwdrHbCRzw1LYmgmtypKqgj_nps3490lZQ==&ch=HKU2hn9epzcfW6bIojp5l3K0J0jkJ7anJy1ziJyVTjrYdAnsd2bzIA==)
---
| | |
---
|

The unhinged rhetoric from Democrats on election integrity is pathological at this point. IT IS SIMPLY CRAZY.
Don't fall for their bad-faith, incessant lying and demagoguery over common sense voting bills in Texas, Georgia, and elsewhere. The left and their allies in the press are LYING about these bills because they want to pass H.R. 1 \- the bill that would totally undermine election integrity efforts across the country.
Here's what the bills actually do:
1) Accountability at Polls: Puts safeguards in place so poll watchers aren't denied access, improving transparency and confidence in results.
(Democrat officials put obstacles in the way of poll watchers in the 2020 election. The legislation fixes that.)
2) Stops Voter Assistance Fraud: Protects individuals who require assistance (such as seniors or those with vision limitations) by requiring information from the person assisting.
Why? Because these voters are more likely to be victimized by partisan activists.
3) Increases penalties against ballot harvesting, the practice of gathering and submitting completed absentee or mail-in voter ballots by third-party individuals, volunteers or workers, rather than submission by voters themselves directly to ballot collection sites.
4) Uniform Voting Times: Creates uniformity in early voting times to reduce confusion while ensuring at least 12 hours a day and polling places can be open until 9PM.
This fixes the different voting times in different counties that confused voters.
5) Secure and Fair Voting Locations: Prohibits universal drive-thru voting, prohibits election officials from distributing mail in applications to people who didn't request one, and ensures polling places and machines are distributed fairly based on number of eligible voters.
This prevents you from getting someone else's ballot, which often happens when the state universally mails out ballots based on addresses from imperfect registration rolls.
6) Strengthens Ballot Security: Requires that voting machines are able to produce a paper audit trail and requires live streaming of counting for large counties.
Does any of that sound like racist voter suppression? No, of course not. The majority of these reforms simply unwind the "emergency measures" implemented during the pandemic.
Mayor Turner said "these bills are Jim Crow 2.0." Jim Crow voting restrictions included poll taxes, literacy tests, and grandfather clauses. It is absurd to make these comparisons since absolutely no provision would stop a person from voting.
But Democrats, woke corporations, and the press don't care about facts. They don't even care about making it "easier" for people to vote. They just care about dividing people with identity politics because it gives them more power.
Don't listen to them. Don't trust them.
Fight back. clean_body: POLL: Do you feel safe? | Peter, For months on end, the liberal media touted Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as a “return to normalcy”... Now let’s assess the situation: rising inflation, no economic recovery in sight, censorship of conservative voices, a crisis at our southern border, continued talks of defunding our police, and unrest in the Middle East. Simply put, Biden and Kamala have wreaked havoc on our great country. Which is why I’m reaching out to the Silent Majority to hear directly from YOU about how grassroots Americans really feel about the state of our country. In record time, Biden and Kamala began erasing President Trump’s America First policies that brought prosperity to so many. They’ve decided to ignore everyday Americans in favor of liberal elites and megadonors like George Soros. Our last line of defense against their radical agenda depends entirely on our ability to take back the Senate majority from Kamala’s control. And as a Navy SEAL, I refuse to back down from a fight when the fate of our country is on the line. That’s why I’m fighting tooth and nail to win this OPEN seat that will decide the fate of the 50/50 Senate. But in order to win this fight, we’re going to have to build a grassroots movement just like President Trump did... And to do that, I need to know exactly where the Silent Majority stands. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Friend,

One of our greatest national security threats is the rise of China. We’ve got to take this seriously, and I need help from patriots like you to stand up for the United States and **[stand against the Chinese Communist Party.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=86c844a9614f4ca095f3e78909e3a953&_e=CyJlg7ryevSenIQgBy60oLwBGtLbn30z7SESKrvVGrLUWksh1twGm-mvyH7BiJl58kqVQFxfF3dofQXiJFC6GAvnrHKo1iiS8nn5S_LVtmKtl8NvLywl7hAZtEEgmAfIqEtjYWlqqu6BKEiHdOkBMt0TV2780zxp9OyZlQYBCY6Vfzy7eyt82S9AK3SaPi9-2UZSDvNKhA8sdm0S2mmWMm6pu1mT--Pgqov2bcJ6J3HX86oImhwXgw_WCJiO8A_aqqzCAHf_iVjD4f0ONxQbaamuD2yJRAVwKxWkPEb50s3lCf8ZDZaNZh8mAoOx5ZnXp4uqqgIt_zVfbWOwBdy9qaGIpSFRlF4xNY-WdRtt3_2FTlRwzyrH9e6z9ktcZ2hJZrK70TqiEFaU9r4rm6oPhBefJsiYgSRdqr0xUzqlZymWhpOSDRCg0QaSR9NX7YkrSGMaL4hHRzqWnW_97DVx3_sTYUgrDph5n-VL6e6g0wc%3D)**

China is:

**❌ Committing human rights violations against its citizens, including the persecution of religious minorities

❌ Growing military strength at an alarming rate

❌ Working to spread Communism worldwide

❌ Covering up the origins of COVID-19**

China’s power is on the rise, and the only way to stop the leaders of the Chinese Communist Party from making China the world’s next superpower is to show them that American democracy is stronger than ever.

[**That’s why I’m personally inviting you to step up and stand against the CCP and its Communist propaganda.**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=86c844a9614f4ca095f3e78909e3a953&_e=CyJlg7ryevSenIQgBy60oLwBGtLbn30z7SESKrvVGrLUWksh1twGm-mvyH7BiJl58kqVQFxfF3dofQXiJFC6GAvnrHKo1iiS8nn5S_LVtmKtl8NvLywl7hAZtEEgmAfIqEtjYWlqqu6BKEiHdOkBMt0TV2780zxp9OyZlQYBCY6Vfzy7eyt82S9AK3SaPi9-2UZSDvNKhA8sdm0S2mmWMm6pu1mT--Pgqov2bcJ6J3HX86oImhwXgw_WCJiO8A_aqqzCAHf_iVjD4f0ONxQbaYehE3-3G0QCxAsmm21CNPY5cS_LKwmIZO94wJRNOodmqRI76FdAD2JoIkFnBps2mtxv_Av5RCZJIjdgT7xnziFTesdKYMl3MbKf_rY3uaYxpnJbDpFO6VQAy6USyp_MaTVoGs20LQoHKe1o5Nu-oxcm_MKS4H5ttGh9CrKFSrU9VS2t-kjYNIkG4X383SuBo5Xc70B2eL6oWzF9c8mrU4U%3D) | [**STAND UP TO CHINA**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=86c844a9614f4ca095f3e78909e3a953&_e=CyJlg7ryevSenIQgBy60oLwBGtLbn30z7SESKrvVGrLUWksh1twGm-mvyH7BiJl58kqVQFxfF3dofQXiJFC6GAvnrHKo1iiS8nn5S_LVtmKtl8NvLywl7hAZtEEgmAfIqEtjYWlqqu6BKEiHdOkBMt0TV2780zxp9OyZlQYBCY6Vfzy7eyt82S9AK3SaPi9-2UZSDvNKhA8sdm0S2mmWMm6pu1mT--Pgqov2bcJ6J3HX86oImhwXgw_WCJiO8A_aqqzCAHf_iVjD4f0ONxQbaZRfMEHttZO8iOAxKKnmanD_UiiyCnvhJR2ipOQORSdw0jEcEqtKvZyjnsEjIB99Jp8ZG_i7lWNuf0kMuCfDiNAHYbZSVZiuJ5WrGvd3P8NRmN480kGI7xturjkqCIgyJa_8-lg1drz3BnrE9tRg-j33pex_PBfuTjC0RWVgvMd3YfZhcV1URcKKmbyPQaSs8t8wYu2vO2M-7tRPXs2FIR8%3D)

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Since I announced on May 3rd, more than 4,000 conservatives from across the country have made a gift to my campaign with the intention of sending a co I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d422675e7e4b47a3b07630b4a8532834&_e=RnyxHfGCJrIvbcjoLGab-tQR2XbyuaMtqXDmUnUSog6wNSa0TwXpytLfCwcAvaiwQUqHZ7pbFtfdoypC0lXm0tGliF6RexZ_Wu-Qe2hFi8O5njO_yj_e75A_BaggtmSiIxO0vN9P2MNyUMkm-1ByC7i5v4gcR6XxLZpGvTFQk6oo0D_zC8MO5pSLHPtzpWHF4YyqF2qgWu7EDJDIw6isvjRrDUp27bpmuyTG9_KfmbESg6bsOo0hR7L-rJe08Qj2sJzelo2IpSE135UUCP7zP7rmWelh89w3GV8FSmwKatc7QAaslc8uKkQ0m8MqvUQbPdFmUp_UkT1ykbSqY5NHvL4WaaXdeYr53Vi6SrhI_F-qoW7hrUAK63lkhNoLfplXiMq3KvuEeX-g4V_cUuoTxqHpYZwTg-jo6x9oQqY7GlzH6lwQ5Snlf9IAR0MA4fwRhEDbygDQMMgid2BL-HcMBQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

I won’t take up too much of your time today, I’m just writing to say thank you for helping me quick off my second campaign for Congress on the strongest possible note.

**Since I announced on May 3rd, more than 4,000 conservatives from across the country have made a gift to my campaign with the intention of sending a conservative to Congress who will represent our shared valued**.

My opponent, Peter DeFazio, won’t be easy to beat, but I know that **with you on our team** we are going to send him into retirement.

We have a lot of work to do in preparation for this next battle, and from the emails Peter’s team is sending out they aren’t going to be caught sleeping at the wheel like they were last year.

I look forward to continuing our work together.

Thank you very much.

Since I announced on May 3rd, more than 4,000 conservatives from across the country have made a gift to my campaign with the intention of sending a conservative to Congress who will represent our shared valued. My opponent, Peter DeFazio, won’t be easy to beat, but I know that with you on our team we are going to send him into retirement. We have a lot of work to do in preparation for this next battle, and from the emails Peter’s team is sending out they aren’t going to be caught sleeping at the wheel like they were last year. I look forward to continuing our work together. Thank you very much. subject: We can still launch an investigation of January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The GOP blocked the bipartisan January 6 commission with the filibuster. But we still have a chance to learn the full truth. **CBS: House Democrats seek ways to investigate January 6 after Senate Republicans block commission** Speaker Pelosi can sidestep Republican obstruction and set up a House investigation on her own. That would give us the chance to learn exactly who worked with the insurrectionists and subpoena public testimony from those who know the truth. **We cannot let the GOP hide from their guilt, and the truth cannot wait.** So we have to ask: **Should Nancy Pelosi move forward with a January 6 investigation in the House?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30321684/289183457/1952704642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNGI0YTZjLTM0YzYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qqKkWMJbo89xPV4l10LFZLBsDIk9coFqH_6L6IhB1lU=&emci=3f149593-b8c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ef4b4a6c-34c6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30321685/289183458/1952704642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNGI0YTZjLTM0YzYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qqKkWMJbo89xPV4l10LFZLBsDIk9coFqH_6L6IhB1lU=&emci=3f149593-b8c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ef4b4a6c-34c6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

Thank you for letting us know how you feel. It is critical that we learn the full truth about this assault on our democracy.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

subject: I know I said final...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | | I just met with my team and if we can raise another $7,000 tonight, we will be able to expand our reach this weekend. Expanding our reach means connecting with more voters at this critical time, just 3 days before primary day.

So I’m asking you to help us expand our reach. THIS is it. There’s no time to waste. I don’t want any of us waking up on Wednesday knowing we could have dug deeper or done more to win.

Here’s the link to help towards this final goal:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_weekly](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-sqVleQRfpNxYcQ1MDbhY4pZMMAhYt30D_sJ7InwX_SA7mKYWKRAe237n9Gw4XDylvK3xTbfMDo29Qlh3j4Zkp2LhZoD5JrYBbk-AmigMSyBVyDDufqeOkedklU3Bu992cAVisLLeJ_OGliHO-bYseN6pXICICzVint2haSvT8OPK1ymwuv4srHiG6iGRRXhjQStjUmrYWArqy278L1Y77CqCDZfeEVf7nBSlZXTbGbFH8zzNpnos8mAhO2GErmfqO0cJ3IZldWaqNIbCN60JwsQjRwTrmvCX_xqx5jFd3UA/3ci/Dxvgol68T4ONBuoOtHsfSg/h0/Lg4hn0wV3A9Bq8qK9NXyU8fSUe8c5r_PPVIyiXGy7Ds)**

Jennifer

>
> We’re about to enter GOTV weekend. In case you don’t know, that stands for Get Out the Vote.
>
> This is the final moment to mobilize voters and turn them out for Tuesday’s primary.
>
> **I know my message is resonating with Virginians. Now the challenge is expanding my reach in the final days.[That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Donate now to expand our reach with our GOTV Fund.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-sqVleQRfpNxYcQ1MDbhY4pZMMAhYt30D_sJ7InwX_SA7mKYWKRAe237n9Gw4XDyltLjTOdhZwavGYwFD9oY-njkYYo2D5Afprp5baFz5t48I0ka5FNeuIAtKw1R_NZmwXHpDfGgCeGxn3x1YrBfg1DtVjtwItp-zP0x-QwrU9KD2ANtwoxM7pt50zBmHE2LydJOMNTeNZFthLtZciZWZ2nIehwtywkh7BNOOyoPQ3bXt2ImpYAcm4IGuT43ZDcgR1V_uwFW8pLLJr3pJBPotSudST57MWkthbvUqeJufXjk/3ci/Dxvgol68T4ONBuoOtHsfSg/h1/JEdRcr2P7Ee5FHAGZYMvdHc-aVuOOlnGqs42xLvsg4I)**
>
> This moment calls for something new. It calls for someone who has walked in Virginians’ shoes, who knows their struggles, and who has been effective at solving them. I’m confident I’m the right candidate for this moment.
>
> We need to elect someone who can bring bold, transformational change to Virginia; who will inspire a working mom to stand in line at her polling place to cast her ballot; who doesn’t just have a record of solving Virginia’s challenges in the legislature, but who has actually lived through them.
>
> I have lived on minimum wage -- which is why, as Delegate, I fought hard for (and passed) raising the minimum wage.
>
> I have lived without healthcare, and many of my loved ones have, too. It’s why I’m proud that we expanded Medicaid to over 500,000 Virginians.
>
> My family has been hit hard by this pandemic, just as many working families across Virginia have. It’s why I’m the right leader to build a stronger post-COVID economy for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
>
> **With your help and support, we can and will elect new leadership for our state and we will make history by electing the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.[Donate now and power my campaign through our GOTV weekend.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-sqVleQRfpNxYcQ1MDbhY4pZMMAhYt30D_sJ7InwX_SA7mKYWKRAe237n9Gw4XDylsAmZstrdehdlhn9kQppfghgkEveqHetpYSPDQEe0BQWhjgD6vMB4bj0UwLg0xrnJ9U0kXTzX7M7S1Z0UXEVQCnntoRWHOEAy4ntfd_DTC9x_PAMIQlzDlkYnl5bREvC77-A4HFwifdHoQGQ70kPzze7wjEGZkNfR9f7ZsvCTLNfCyRwmEONq2nnKwWggGN0NJOnCzYcSXG_3h5WG4w46ASpde6vJZY2zomcz-tUE1ck/3ci/Dxvgol68T4ONBuoOtHsfSg/h2/I2Z_FQWeHm9tsC0NE_9dQjBI7hdw3IXNRQcyyFIWyI4) **

clean_body: | | | I just met with my team and if we can raise another $7,000 tonight, we will be able to expand our reach this weekend. Expanding our reach means connecting with more voters at this critical time, just 3 days before primary day. So I’m asking you to help us expand our reach. THIS is it. There’s no time to waste. I don’t want any of us waking up on Wednesday knowing we could have dug deeper or done more to win. Here’s the link to help towards this final goal: Jennifer Begin forwarded message: We’re about to enter GOTV weekend. In case you don’t know, that stands for Get Out the Vote. This is the final moment to mobilize voters and turn them out for Tuesday’s primary. I know my message is resonating with Virginians. Now the challenge is expanding my reach in the final days. This moment calls for something new. It calls for someone who has walked in Virginians’ shoes, who knows their struggles, and who has been effective at solving them. I’m confident I’m the right candidate for this moment. We need to elect someone who can bring bold, transformational change to Virginia; who will inspire a working mom to stand in line at her polling place to cast her ballot; who doesn’t just have a record of solving Virginia’s challenges in the legislature, but who has actually lived through them. I have lived on minimum wage -- which is why, as Delegate, I fought hard for (and passed) raising the minimum wage. I have lived without healthcare, and many of my loved ones have, too. It’s why I’m proud that we expanded Medicaid to over 500,000 Virginians. My family has been hit hard by this pandemic, just as many working families across Virginia have. It’s why I’m the right leader to build a stronger post-COVID economy for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. With your help and support, we can and will elect new leadership for our state and we will make history by electing the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Happy GOTV! Jennifer Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities. She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor. Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. ** | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via . Kevin joined Ben Shapiro for a frank conversation about this campaign >>
Peter, **Kevin is excited to turn this great state around.** But first, we need to spread his California Comeback message to everyone in the state and win this election. We have a serious campaign with serious solutions to fix our state’s problems and the liberal media establishment is desperate to downplay us. _Over 2 million people signed the recall and people are leaving California in droves. They left because of Newsom’s implementation of radical left, job-killing policies, and he continues to pretend it isn’t happening._ Kevin joined “The Ben Shapiro Show” this week to do a deep dive on where Newsom went wrong and where Kevin wants to take us.
**[Watch now>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1eabc0a5b2633d4d/4920505c6538134fc3d6b838967d376c/34943)** [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1eabc0a5b2633d4d/93600027ab6b6d0fc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Ben hit the nail on the head when he said, “I hope to see Gavin Newsom out on his tuchus.” Please help us spread the truth about Newsom’s effect on the mass exodus from the Golden State by **[sharing this video from “The Ben Shapiro Show”](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1eabc0a5b2633d4d/c3ac5b760dc04260c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**. Forward this email, or share the link on Twitter, Facebook, or whatever social media platform you’re on — just make sure to get the word out. It’s time to recall Gavin Newsom and elect a real leader like Kevin Faulconer. Kevin has a proven track record of creating an environment where businesses can flourish, and people can prosper. **[Watch his interview with Ben Shapiro now >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1eabc0a5b2633d4d/747a3b850a27feb3c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Thanks for your help,

body:
Donald Trump's brand of "patriotism" is not what Virginia needs.
| | |
---

Derek,

This is a crisis.

Hours after Glenn Youngkin became the Republican nominee for Virginia Governor, Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin in an email he sent to millions of his supporters.

Trump is even calling Youngkin a “patriot” because Glenn is pushing the same sham voter suppression scam he is.

Derek, Donald Trump's brand of "patriotism" is not what Virginia needs. Glenn Youngkin is a dangerous Trump-backed extremist who wants to erase Virginia’s progress by bringing in Trumpism through the back door of the Governor’s office.

Terry has to beat him, and he needs our help.

**[Will you donate to Terry’s campaign right now so he has the resources to go toe-to-toe with Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30325422/289197155/-2023814932?refcode=20210605_JC_6L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWY4MDU5OC00OWM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bXqA5jw-FHXWKqII3ObOplFoRlsJPNKb5W3WhBKyOY=)**

This is about more than Virginia -- experts are saying Virginia’s governor’s race is 2021’s most important election.

It ain't hard to see why -- with Terry leading the charge, Virginia Democrats worked their hearts out to fire Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden.

And it worked.

But here’s the thing, with Trump getting into Virginia’s race, everything we fought for in 2020 is back on the line.

I want to be able to say we’re done with Trump’s era of hate and division. I want to be able to say that our democracy is strong and more people can vote, not less.

But we can’t do that unless Terry wins this thing. I’m counting on you to help make it happen.

**[Please, I’m asking directly, Derek. I need you to step up right now and rush a contribution to Terry’s campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30325423/289197156/-2023814932?refcode=20210605_JC_6L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWY4MDU5OC00OWM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bXqA5jw-FHXWKqII3ObOplFoRlsJPNKb5W3WhBKyOY=)**

Let’s beat this guy once and for all,

James Carville
[DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30325424/289197157/-2023814932?refcode=20210605_JC_6L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWY4MDU5OC00OWM2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bXqA5jw-FHXWKqII3ObOplFoRlsJPNKb5W3WhBKyOY=)

clean_body: Donald Trump's brand of "patriotism" is not what Virginia needs. | | | = | | | We’re only 82 hours until our last fundraising deadline of the primary. We still need 837 donations before we hit our 1,000 donation goal. = | = Derek, This is a crisis. Hours after Glenn Youngkin became the Republican nominee for Virginia Governor, Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin in an email he sent to millions of his supporters. Trump is even calling Youngkin a “patriot” because Glenn is pushing the same sham voter suppression scam he is. Derek, Donald Trump's brand of "patriotism" is not what Virginia needs. Glenn Youngkin is a dangerous Trump-backed extremist who wants to erase Virginia’s progress by bringing in Trumpism through the back door of the Governor’s office. Terry has to beat him, and he needs our help. = This is about more than Virginia -- experts are saying Virginia’s governor’s race is 2021’s most important election. It ain't hard to see why -- with Terry leading the charge, Virginia Democrats worked their hearts out to fire Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden. And it worked. But here’s the thing, with Trump getting into Virginia’s race, everything we fought for in 2020 is back on the line. I want to be able to say we’re done with Trump’s era of hate and division. I want to be able to say that our democracy is strong and more people can vote, not less. But we can’t do that unless Terry wins this thing. I’m counting on you to help make it happen. = Let’s beat this guy once and for all, James Carville = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: I support our brave police officers
body:
We need you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/19c6e52d4315/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4918966?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

This is disgusting. [Amazon is selling merchandise that says “Blue Lives Murder”](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=5efe09c532&e=13f35c4add) and helping the Democrats enact their radical calls to defund our police.

This has gone too far and for too long. **_The lack of respect for our brave officers from those on the left threatens their safety, and the safety of our communities._**

Police officers wake up every day ready to serve, not knowing if they will return home that night.

**Police are heroic, they keep our families safe, our small businesses safe, and our nation safe.**

**_It’s time for radical democrats to wake up and start fighting for the safety of our communities and not their socialist nightmare._**

Are you tired of this? **Are you upset that Democrats continue to insult our police?**

Its time to be loud and proud to support police, and that is why I need you on my team right now. **I’ve been working in Congress to move legislation that puts cops first and protects them from radical democrats – we need to carry this message everywhere.**

[**_> >>Can you rush $10, $20 or $50 RIGHT NOW to put your name on the list of dedicated patriots fighting to protect police? Our nation needs you right now.<<<_**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=4d648064f8&e=13f35c4add)

I am in this fight until Democrats stop attacking our police. We need to stay strong and tell them we will not accept their radical ideas any longer.

**Thank you for supporting our Americans in Blue – we need more like you.**

Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
| |
---
| [RSVP](mailto:erin@jacobs4congress.com "RSVP")
---
|
---
| |
---
|

**JACOBS FOR CONGRESS**
P.O. Box 387
CLARENCE, NY 14031

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b6cb02ac78&e=13f35c4add&c=508fc085e0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b6cb02ac78&e=13f35c4add&c=508fc085e0).

---

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I know what it’s like to make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
In 2018, I was one of two of the first Native American women elected to serve in Congress. When I stood up and announced I was running, a lot of people doubted I could win.

Jennifer Carroll Foy is experiencing the same thing -- all her life, people have told her no. But like me, Jennifer is defying the odds at every turn.

**[I’m personally reaching out and asking you to help Jennifer make history as the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-sqVleQRfpNxYcQ1MDbhY4iEyLRJLcpvBpTOSqqLZKmzdJaC_cdIm4rkJTdFyJuyvP9AK7h3GQ35iOFdr5ev-RJGgL3ChJxDVg_McJXX-FzbqoXTxEC9uFLsxvEXtDi2kotnn47IjyBo3NZAoYM2mvrTdJzKfB-Ij0SsIiGH83eb5c21-GyBdICyVf7yUbKKLHFXBTTF4ntm09OazgR0_PYuo7pbKMeGCnkdwRvc43R1soSiuQFl_4OGmQyl3MHxKraG115T_0wkGH_ddcgtWLwr6xKiAAy6iUc-zLPQP5YZtXT7oQWi3MId2cUnCRzyiqmaZD3VZASOSXUgW7k9I2g/3ci/nLvYhsL8RAWHMVTCB-hpBw/h0/ho8ajo89EJKo0290bI6jEOWcpJU6vm2iM8ubzu2Qiks)**

[DONATE NOW](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-sqVleQRfpNxYcQ1MDbhY4iEyLRJLcpvBpTOSqqLZKmwoTK20VehZSfNUdTL3Zew0uzmGNpWxyb-CtbQbHn8TAS0-dbkmtkolOw5Kw_JgQJlPbMTkcVvWZHIgjw5Ij0_fvtOnkpHttfbwC0dqQJrOLifYkhGOKSMyxkQar2Hy3qZadAli61p9I74CoM1nGchjF77Zg0hnoyCHCOgltcHqvnhK-nPvyhvbTXKVPxwoOj8rbNgZgi7JfpgR0zxQTHQIIAqBE9SyS98Tf6SP27LU2BtOU4EQh2b0flUstvlmd4L6WDXM5hb7UaeP5djmICO9sSX7tN8vQjv-OBLLRj-_8g/3ci/nLvYhsL8RAWHMVTCB-hpBw/h1/c-bKYitws8BuQB-ZQOZ9ha-9FHjakYB-PUkxvMkI5dU)
If there’s one thing our country needs right now, it’s smart, powerful women in leadership who are ready to break barriers, deliver for their constituents, and inspire others to serve their communities.

Throughout her life, Jennifer’s community inspired her to capture her potential and blaze her own path — one that led her to become one of the first women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute and serve in the House of Delegates just after giving birth to twins.

In her public service career, Jennifer has focused on a pro-woman, pro-labor, and pro-environment agenda. clean_body: | | | In 2018, I was one of two of the first Native American women elected to serve in Congress. When I stood up and announced I was running, a lot of people doubted I could win. Jennifer Carroll Foy is experiencing the same thing -- all her life, people have told her no. But like me, Jennifer is defying the odds at every turn. If there’s one thing our country needs right now, it’s smart, powerful women in leadership who are ready to break barriers, deliver for their constituents, and inspire others to serve their communities. Throughout her life, Jennifer’s community inspired her to capture her potential and blaze her own path — one that led her to become one of the first women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute and serve in the House of Delegates just after giving birth to twins. In her public service career, Jennifer has focused on a pro-woman, pro-labor, and pro-environment agenda. After leading the charge in the Virginia House of Delegates to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, Jennifer knew she had to keep fighting for everyday Virginians, just like those who lifted her up years ago. body:
Big endorsement |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6827f11ea2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud Republican, a former cop, first responder, paramedic, and business leader. Most importantly and proudly, I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative.

**I have spearheaded a large grassroots movement to undertake “America’s Audit” in Maricopa County, where every day we are uncovering evidence of systemic election fraud in the 2020 election.**

_We are trailblazing a path that will lead to greater scrutiny in key swing states with huge systemic election fraud in 2020, like Georgia, Pennsylvania, and Michigan._

**But the fight does not end there. We have a long road ahead of us.**

**Proving there is systemic election fraud is not enough.**

**_We need to oust the fraudsters._**

And that means Republicans taking over key elected offices.

**This is why I am writing you today. [I urgently need your support as I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona where I will personally oversee election integrity in Arizona!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=24da115268&e=44b8c466b0)**

And to that end, I have secured a KEY endorsement from a great man and Conservative.

**But more on that later.**

**_I need your support to continue the campaign. We are making tremendous strides in our campaign, but we are being targeted on all sides._**

By Democrats.

By the Fake News Media.

By RINOS who won’t stand up to the Radical Left.

**I need proud patriots like you to join the cause!**

[_Please donate GENEROUSLY today to fight back against election fraud in Arizona and around the country!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=855d66aa75&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6cfe6ba3e1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Former NYPD Commissioner Bernard Kerik just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State, saying:**

**_“I support Mark Finchem for Arizona Secretary of State. He has the integrity, the backbone, and the technical knowledge to ensure our elections are safe and secure from fraud and interference. He knows the job and he will ensure election integrity.”_**

Bernard Kerik is a great man, who with great experience:
* Bernard Kerik earned 30 medals for excellent, meritorious, and heroic service
* He received the New York City Police Department Medal of Valor
* He was honored by Queen Elizabeth II for his heroic work during and in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks.

**I am proud of this endorsement, as he stood by my side and by President Trump in the immediate aftermath of the election fraud in the stolen 2020 election.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c0bdd363e0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Arizona’s Audit in Maricopa County has been a blessing as the tireless work of countless patriots such as myself, the grassroots movement, and Bernard Kerik have enabled and empowered tremendous success in uncovering systemic election fraud.**

_But Bernard Kerik knows there is a long way to go, and our work is just beginning, which is why he has endorsed me for my run for Secretary of State of Arizona._

**Bernard Kerik knows that I helped start the job, and now I can finish it.** **_“If it wasn’t for Finchem and Borrelli and the hearing they held, this would have been swept under the rug” - Bernard Kerik_**

Friend and Patriots, we are watching history unfold as one of the greatest grassroots movements in history continues to grow – and I am incredibly proud to have Bernard Kerik and Donald Trump on my side.

**Will you join us in our crusade against systemic election fraud to preserve the integrity of our elections?**

[_Join me, Bernard Kerik, Donald Trump, and countless other patriots fighting systemic election fraud by donating today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cdb29fd165&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b85ca5b705&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _[Donate as much as you can to elect me Secretary of State of Arizona!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2e3ff6f4db&e=44b8c466b0)_

**My name is Mark Finchem.**

**_I am used to getting attacked on all sides. That’s what happens when you go up against the Fake News Media and the establishment._**

But someone’s got to do it, and I’m the man for the job.

_I will do whatever it takes to make sure that Arizona’s elections are safe, and that AMERICA’S elections are safe._

**Will you stand with me?**

[_Donate TODAY! Let’s stop election fraud together!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=962e1e60a3&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9817d87848&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,

name: Heidi St. John
subject: My Response to Recent Accusations
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Friends Of Heidi St
body:
Keeping you up to date
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
---
Hello Friends,
With 425 days until the 2022 Primary election, the battle for Washington's 3rd Congressional District intensifies. Sadly, in a smear piece taken straight from the Democrat's playbook, an online news magazine has entered the fight with a mud-slinging article.
In true Fake News form, no one attempted to contact the campaign to seek the truth.
We've all grown accustomed to seeing the far left make up ridiculous accusations against political opponents, but it's heartbreaking to see Conservatives resorting to the same disgusting tactics. Those of us who still care about this country have enough on our hands fighting for the freedoms we are losing and the America we love without resorting to cheap, leftist political dirty tricks and hatchet jobs. We must stand together if we're to stand at all.
It's disappointing to see people I respect be willing to so quickly believe such things about me. The hundreds of thousands of people who follow me know that I am an open book and care deeply about truth and integrity in every area of my life. These attempts to destroy my character and undermine my effort to unseat Jaime Herrera-Beutler do not deter me. I will address these baseless accusations on Monday. I am an advocate for truth. Always.
This is a new part of the battlefield!
---
---

We've all grown accustomed to seeing the far left make up ridiculous accusations against political opponents, but it's heartbreaking to see Conservatives resorting to the same disgusting tactics. Those of us who still care about this country have enough on our hands fighting for the freedoms we are losing and the America we love without resorting to cheap, leftist political dirty tricks and hatchet jobs. We must stand together if we're to stand at all. It's disappointing to see people I respect be willing to so quickly believe such things about me. The hundreds of thousands of people who follow me know that I am an open book and care deeply about truth and integrity in every area of my life. These attempts to destroy my character and undermine my effort to unseat Jaime Herrera-Beutler do not deter me. I will address these baseless accusations on Monday. I am an advocate for truth. Always. This is a new part of the battlefield! | | | | | | | | | | | We want you to be informed about all the campaign activities and opportunities, not to mention the latest news. Stay up to date by following us on the platforms below. clean_body: I need your help fighting back. | Friend, I need your help defending Wisconsin. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and the DNC Chair are all doing a fundraiser this weekend for the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. Their invite couldn’t be any clearer – Democrats are completely focused on Wisconsin. They desperately need Wisconsin in order to maintain full liberal control of our government. And they are terrified of Wisconsin going back red. Help us make that happen! I’m not going to sugar coat it, they’ll likely raise a pile of cash from this event. We’ve already seen the Democrat Party of WI bring in millions from out-of-state liberal donors... allowing them to transfer $2 Million to Tony Evers’ campaign. But I will not sit back and watch liberals outpace us. If we don’t fight back, no one will! Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

_"The right of voting for representatives is the primary right
by which other rights are protected."_
_- _Thomas Paine
---
| June 5, 2021 Dear Friend, For too many years, politicos have avoided tough conversations about election accuracy and security. The process is complicated; problems are both granular and epic. It was easier to cede the ground, so they did. But, from the founding of America to the founding of True the Vote, patriotic citizens have always known that our votes secure our freedom. Now the issues of secure, accurate, fair, accountable election processes have taken center stage. The stories were leading news in November, and they are leading news this very weekend. People intuitively know something is very wrong, but how to scope it, how to prove it. When you think you're at the bottom, you realize it was a false floor. To the newly initiated, it is tough to separate the signal from the noise - and the noise is deafening. Here's where we are: True the Vote's current projects have not been made public. It's just how it has to be right now. Familiarity with the state-specific pitfalls of our nation's uniquely insecure process served us well in our decision to focus investigative efforts on voter roll maintenance, web-based election services, and vote trafficking (aka harvesting ... but that is far too kind a term). There are tangible results from our effort. We keenly understand the imperative to publish our findings. That will happen without fail, but law enforcement needs time to do what they need to do. Over the coming weeks, you'll get first-hand knowledge of what we've uncovered. You'll have access to amazing new tools **you** will be able to use to fight future election subversion. Despite coming against incredible obstacles, we have not slowed down; we've scaled up. We have a new Georgia office. We have an expanded team. We are resolute. Just as we did in 2020, True the Vote in 2021 will lead the way in helping to secure that "primary right" of which Thomas Paine spoke, from which all of America's promise and virtue is ensured. Together, with your help, we will protect America's promise. And bring truth back to the vote. Ever onward -

## Eyes On | Texas
_by Dan Gelernter, True the Vote_ Texas Democrats attempted to block the passage of an election integrity bill (SB 7) by walking out on the last day of the legislative session. “We may have won the war tonight, but the battle is not over,” said Democratic state Rep. Nicole Collier, confusing the meaning of “war” and “battle.” Governor Abbott has indicated he intends to call a special session to vote on the bill, and has threatened to veto funds for the Texas legislature. Texas Democrats have staged walkouts on two previous occasions in attempts to prevent legislation from passing. In one case several Democrats went so far as to flee to Oklahoma. But these histrionics have never succeeded in preventing the passage of a bill, and they won’t succeed this time: True the Vote projects that this election integrity bill will be passed in a special session. More dangerous is the concealed agenda behind the Texas Democrats’ walkout, in which the media, social media and corporate America are all aligned: They need to federalize control of elections, in order to strip red states of their protections against fraud. That is why all criticisms of state election reform are followed by a call to the US Congress to pass S1 or the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, either of which would transfer control of state election law to the Department of Justice. [**Learn about the contents of the bill, and the Democrats’ larger game in walking out on the vote here.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=e6485513b5&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Texas Gov Pushes Legislation to Curb Big Tech Content Moderation**
_From Washington Free Beacon_ \- In a press conference on Friday, Texas governor Greg Abbott (R.) announced S.B. 12, a bill that would prohibit social media companies from "censoring Texans." "Conservative speech will not be canceled in the state of Texas," said the governor. The bill's language is similar to that of legislation proposed by Republicans in several states, including Arizona, Minnesota, and Florida, where it was
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f313e1fe2f&e=ad8cba7e98)

**What Is the Future of Civics Education?**
_From RedState _\- So, what should Civics education look like in a course that will become a major part of high school students’ graduation requirement? If this becomes something we see in every state, what should the model be? There will need to be a deep understanding of the election systems. Why is it not (nor should it be) controlled by the federal government and instead run by the states? What purpose does the Electoral College serve and why should we keep it? Can it be stolen and how could that be prevented if so? Students will have to understand the three branches of government and how they check each others’ power.

clean_body: | | | | | | | "The right of voting for representatives is the primary right by which other rights are protected." - Thomas Paine | June 5, 2021 Dear Friend, For too many years, politicos have avoided tough conversations about election accuracy and security. The process is complicated; problems are both granular and epic. It was easier to cede the ground, so they did. But, from the founding of America to the founding of True the Vote, patriotic citizens have always known that our votes secure our freedom. Now the issues of secure, accurate, fair, accountable election processes have taken center stage. The stories were leading news in November, and they are leading news this very weekend. People intuitively know something is very wrong, but how to scope it, how to prove it. When you think you're at the bottom, you realize it was a false floor. To the newly initiated, it is tough to separate the signal from the noise - and the noise is deafening. Here's where we are: True the Vote's current projects have not been made public. It's just how it has to be right now. Familiarity with the state-specific pitfalls of our nation's uniquely insecure process served us well in our decision to focus investigative efforts on voter roll maintenance, web-based election services, and vote trafficking (aka harvesting ... but that is far too kind a term). There are tangible results from our effort. We keenly understand the imperative to publish our findings. That will happen without fail, but law enforcement needs time to do what they need to do. Over the coming weeks, you'll get first-hand knowledge of what we've uncovered. You'll have access to amazing new tools you will be able to use to fight future election subversion. Despite coming against incredible obstacles, we have not slowed down; we've scaled up. We have a new Georgia office. We have an expanded team. We are resolute. Just as we did in 2020, True the Vote in 2021 will lead the way in helping to secure that "primary right" of which Thomas Paine spoke, from which all of America's promise and virtue is ensured. Together, with your help, we will protect America's promise. And bring truth back to the vote.
